mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_behavior (user_id, article_id, behavior_type, duration, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{articleId}, #{behaviorType}, #{duration}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, article_id, behavior_type, duration, create_time FROM user_behavior WHERE article_id = #{articleId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_behavior WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_behavior WHERE article_id = #{articleId}
SELECT id, user_id, article_id, behavior_type, duration, create_time FROM user_behavior WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId}
SELECT id, user_id, article_id, behavior_type, duration, create_time FROM user_behavior ORDER BY create_time DESC
